mergedPullRequests.title: Fix trailing slash handling for dynamic file endpoints in dev mode
Fix styles silently dropped when `await` is used in .astro template markup
Fix getCollection() returning empty in dev mode for large content collections
Revert async-slot head propagation fix from #17228
Stabilize Windows prefetch E2E test
Document route cache invalidation behavior
Harden transition directive attribute rendering
chore: simpler package.json types
FIx: inverted logic in a11y-no-redundant-roles rule
chore(deps): update sharp to v0.35
chore: bump compiler to latest
chore(seo): remove redundant twitter metadata tags
[ci] release
feat(vite-plugin-html): Replace rehype by ultrahtml
fix: bump prettier to fix smoke tests
ci: add auto close workflow
fix(head): use correct name attribute for twitter:card meta tag
Pre-bundle Cloudflare worker server entrypoint in dev
Fix styles dropped when an await precedes a propagating component in slot markup
Use Vite tsconfig path resolution by default
fix: background dev server fails to start in hoisted monorepos
fix(client router): prevent head elements loss during page transitions with server:defer component
Fix inline `<style>` blocks ignoring `vite.build.target` when `cssMinify` is false
chore(head): normalize html charset declarations
Fix dev server restart causing missing deps_ssr file errors
fix: peer deps of packages
Add `edgeFunctions` to Netlify adapter `devFeatures` to allow disabling edge function emulation
Fix syntax highlighting breaking after `@property` in `<style>` blocks
Respect custom image services for Cloudflare build-time generation (`compile` + `custom`)
Fix prefetch not triggering for links inside server:defer components
[ci] release
fix(language-server): bump volar-service-* to 0.0.71 (CVE-2026-33532)
Restore proxy support in create-astro for corporate/firewall environments
Skip dev server setup in `configureServer` when running inside Vitest
Fix astro check failing to resolve dependencies when astro is in a virtual store
Fix false deprecation warning for markdown.gfm/smartypants in Container API
Apply the origin check to Astro Actions regardless of pipeline order
fix(@astrojs/solid-js): detect Svelte 5 components using the $$renderer prop
Treat backslash-prefixed paths as internal in trailing-slash handling
Validate attribute names on custom HTML elements during SSR
Fix `render()` type error when using live collections without a content config
Keep component scripts in place when rendered via Astro.slots.render()
Find Astro.locals references from .ts files in the TypeScript plugin
chore: bump triagebot-action to v0.3.9
Resolve extensionless imports in island component paths
Fix `inferSize` for remote images in the `Picture` component
Fix empty style tags for virtual CSS modules in dev mode when JS is disabled
Fix route generator throwing on a dynamic param value of 0
[ci] release
Respect integration-defined image services for Cloudflare build-time image generation
